status_line: The LA Galaxy window officially closed today — Jacobi never got reached, five consecutive red flags and now the optimal first-two-weeks window is gone. SARAH just ran a clean sweep and flagged a set of 4K film grain overlays in Downloads that might be useful for NOLAN. Everything else holds: Gallery at 9.0, GUARDIAN still dark at 11 cycles, SCOUT quiet after this morning. The nightly report fires in a few hours.
